name: §2.27 continuation artifact lives at .claude-tdd-pro/agent-continuations/<session_id>.json per the contract path
command: H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=.claude-tdd-pro/agent-continuations bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --write --session-id cl-target --parent-session-id cl-src --parent-cl-id cl-src --current-phase F --context-summary mid --next-action go --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && [ -s .claude-tdd-pro/agent-continuations/cl-target.json ] && echo path 1>&2
